rtmp/rtmpplaylist

        loadPlaylist

        nextVideo
      • nextVideo(ps: PlaylistState): string

Types

PlaylistState = ref object
  videoFiles*: seq[string]   ## Lists of video file paths
  audioFiles*: seq[string]   ## Lists of video and audio file paths
  videoIdx*: int             ## Indexes for current video and audio files
  audioIdx*: int             ## Indexes for current video and audio files
  currentAudioPath*: string  ## Path of the current audio file being streamed
  currentAudioDone*: bool    ## Indicates if the current audio file has finished streaming
  globalTs*: uint32          ## Global timestamp for synchronization
Lists of video and audio files

Procs

proc loadPlaylist(filePath: string): seq[string] {....raises: [IOError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc nextAudio(ps: PlaylistState): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc nextVideo(ps: PlaylistState): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
